name: ai-trend-report
description: Research Harness Engineering topics and produce a sourced PDF report.

interface.shortDescription: Create sourced Harness Engineering PDF reports.
interface.longDescription: Harness Engineering Report researches Harness-related engineering, DevOps, CI/CD, platform engineering, security, FinOps, and AI-in-SDLC topics, then creates a concise sourced PDF report.
defaultPrompt: Harness Engineering 관련 최신 내용을 조사해 PDF 보고서를 만들어줘.
Harness의 CI/CD, IDP, 보안, FinOps 흐름을 분석해줘.
Harness Engineering 관점의 DevOps 트렌드를 정리해줘.
